summary: High-effort check of every card tagged with a geometry code

cards.reason: Kept L-GEOMFARM: the stable must be placed in a pasture of a specific SHAPE/size (exactly 1 farmyard space) — a genuine shape constraint on farm tiles.
Removed L-CARDFIELD: the boars are held on your existing UNPLANTED FIELD TILES, not on the card itself; the card is not a field you sow/harvest on.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'a round immediately following a harvest' depends on the round-space position/band on the action board relative to harvest rounds.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: 'fences >= current round' is a count-vs-current-round-number threshold, not action-board position/order/adjacency; added A-OWN.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: the pasture must cover a SHAPE of at least 4 farmyard spaces and be undivided — a genuine shape constraint on farm tiles.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: the new pasture must be orthogonally ADJACENT to an existing pasture — a real adjacency constraint between farm tiles.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: placing a field on a future round space is scheduling (E-SCHED), not action-board position/adjacency geometry.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: placing fields on specific future round spaces is scheduling (E-SCHED), not board position/adjacency geometry.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: the bonus depends on orthogonally ADJACENT unused farmyard spaces — a genuine adjacency/shape test between farm cells.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: depends on orthogonal adjacency of unused spaces to your house.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'the four action spaces above the Fishing space' is board position/adjacency, not merely a named space.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: 'played on the Major Improvement action space' reads which named space the card was played on, not board position/order/adjacency.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: the card itself is a field you sow/harvest on (veg only).
Removed L-CARDFIELD: pastures (existing farm tiles) become fields; the card itself is not a field. Kept crop/capacity manip codes.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: it reads good-counts on named accumulation spaces (wood/clay/reed/stone), not board position/order/adjacency.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: field tiles are placed on and plowed from the card itself.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: relies on 'Day Laborer' and the ADJACENT 'Lessons' space being adjacent on the board.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: 'last action space you use is an accumulation space' is a category/order-of-use check, not board position/adjacency; kept ST-PLACELOG for tracking last-used space.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: placing food on future round spaces is E-SCHED, not board position/order/adjacency geometry.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: the card itself IS a field you sow/harvest vegetables on.
Removed L-CARDFIELD: hooks the plow sub-action (incl. playing field cards); it does not make this card itself a field to sow/harvest on.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: the plowed field must complete a 'zigzag' pattern — a shape constraint on farm tiles.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: field tiles sit ON the card and are plowed from it; kept ST-STACK for the pile of field tiles on the card.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'the corresponding round space' is a specific numbered round-space position derived from a count — board position dependency.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: the card's effect depends on specific round-number bands (rounds 3-5 vs 6-8) — round-space numbers.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: the card itself is a field you can sow in.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: scores unused farmyard spaces orthogonally adjacent to the house — an adjacency/shape relation between farm tiles.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: placing goods/animals on future round spaces is E-SCHED/E-SCHEDANIMAL, not board position/order/adjacency.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: 'next 4 round spaces' is scheduling (E-SCHED), not board geometry.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'round spaces 8 to 11' references specific round-space numbers/band.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: 'orthogonally adjacent to your house' is farm-tile adjacency.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: placing veg on future round spaces is E-SCHED, no board position/number/adjacency.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: the card itself is a field you sow/harvest (wood) on.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: requires a pasture orthogonally adjacent to the house.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: 'edge of your farmyard board' is a positional/shape condition on farm perimeter edges.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: occupying two specific NAMED spaces (Grain/Vegetable Seeds) is not board position/order/adjacency; occupancy tracked via ST-PLACELOG.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: 'rounds 7 and 9' is a timing condition (which round we're in), not action-board position/adjacency/order geometry.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: marking a future round space (current+3) is scheduling/timing, not action-board position/adjacency geometry.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: scoring depends on the farmyard's 5 columns each containing a room — a spatial/shape read of the farm grid, not a mere count.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: 'last player in turn order' is a turn-order check, not action-board position/adjacency geometry.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: the card itself is a field you sow/harvest on. Added HOOK dims for the 'each time you harvest the last wood' bonus (was under-tagged, geometry-only check retained the card codes).
Kept L-CARDFIELD: the card itself is a field. Removed E-CROPMANIP: harvesting the field then plowing a new field is a granted plow sub-action, not manipulation of crops on fields.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: the card itself is a field. Removed E-GRANTSUB: sowing onto this same card is a special crop-swap on the card field, not a normal granted sow sub-action; E-CROPMANIP captures it.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: fires only when sowing in a field orthogonally adjacent to a pasture — a genuine farm-tile adjacency test.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: the card itself is a field you harvest from in the field phase.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: the card itself is a field you sow/harvest stone on ('Sow and harvest stone on this card').
Kept L-GEOMFARM: room must be orthogonally adjacent to both a field and a pasture (true tile adjacency/shape).
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: hooks the NAMED 'Fishing' space and its good-count, not board position/order/adjacency.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: triggers on a stone accumulation space being revealed (card identity), not on board numbers/position/adjacency.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: reads named wood accumulation spaces and their good-counts, not board position.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'round spaces 5 to 7' are specific round-space numbers/bands.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'round spaces 1/2/3/4' are specific round-space numbers.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: uses the NAMED 'Sheep Market'/'Reed Bank' spaces, not board position/adjacency.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: reads occupancy of the NAMED 'Day Laborer'/'Grain Seeds' spaces, not board position/order/adjacency.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: the gap between two specific adjacent accumulation spaces is a genuine board-position/adjacency dependency, not merely reading a named space's contents.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: '4 field tiles arranged in a 2x2' with a stable in the center is a true orthogonal shape/adjacency requirement.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: only reads occupancy of the named 'Grain Seeds' space, not board position/order/adjacency.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'card revealed right before the most recent harvest' depends on round-space number/reveal order, a board-position dependency.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: 'This card is a field' — the card itself is a field you sow/harvest on. Note: choice is grain-OR-veg but also declinable ('can choose to buy'); F-MANDCHOICE arguable but left as-is.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'the card left of the most recently placed round-space card' is explicit board position/adjacency/order.
Removed L-GEOMFARM: 'for each room you have' is a plain count of rooms, not orthogonal adjacency/shape.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'the action space on round space 13' references a specific round-space number, a board-position dependency.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'action space card on round spaces 8 to 11' is a specific round-space number band, a board-position dependency.
Kept L-CARDFIELD: text explicitly states 'This card is a field' — the card itself is a sow/harvest field.
Removed L-GEOMFARM: building a 2-space pasture is an ordinary size/shape requirement handled by the normal fencing subsystem, not a special inter-tile adjacency rule.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: fires on a field tile placed orthogonally adjacent to an existing field tile — genuine inter-tile adjacency.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: depends on orthogonal adjacency between action spaces on the board.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: uses/hooks the NAMED 'Grove'/'Forest' spaces and their occupancy — a named-space reference, not board position/adjacency.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: keys on two accumulation spaces having equal good-COUNTS, not on board position/order/adjacency.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'the most recently revealed action space card' is an explicit board-order/position case.
Removed L-CARDFIELD: scores vegetables in your existing field TILES; the card is not itself a field.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: keys on occupying the NAMED 'Clay Pit'/'Reed Bank' spaces — named-space reference, not board geometry.

Removed L-GEOMBOARD: 'Fishing accumulation space or one of the three orthogonally adjacent action spaces' — the adjacency is to a NAMED space (Fishing), which the strict test excludes; it reads/hooks named spaces, not a board position/order.
Kept L-GEOMFARM: 'border between each pair of orthogonally adjacent rooms' is genuine orthogonal adjacency/shape between farm tiles (rooms).
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: hooks the NAMED 'Resource Market' action space, which the strict test excludes; no board position/order/adjacency involved.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'action space on round spaces 1 to 8' references specific round-space NUMBERS/band, which is genuine board position.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'action space immediately above or below that accumulation space' is board position/adjacency. Removed E-GOODS as redundant (wild boar is an animal -> E-ANIMALS).
Kept L-GEOMFARM: 'house with exactly 2 rooms surrounded by 4 field tiles' is genuine orthogonal adjacency/shape between rooms and field tiles.
Removed L-GEOMBOARD: 'each complete stage left to play' counts remaining stages, not a board position/order/adjacency; it's a plain count read at play time.
Kept L-GEOMBOARD: 'the most recent action space card' depends on reveal ORDER on the board, which the strict test explicitly counts (most recently revealed card).

workflowProgress.label: geom-1
workflowProgress.promptPreview:
You classify Agricola CARDS (occupations or minor improvements) by the game MECHANICS/FEATURES each one uses, so an engine team can track what still needs building. A card almost always uses SEVERAL mechanics at once — tag EVERY code that applies. Classify ONLY from the card's printed text plus its errata/clarifications (which OVERRIDE the text). Never invent effects the text does not state.
